Content Update 3.28.0 — Path of Exile: Mirage

Mirage League
- Zones can now contain a Mirage portal leading to an astral copy of the area, mirroring its monsters and League mechanics.
- Varashta allows you to choose one of three Wishes before entering, modifying the Mirage in powerful ways.
- Monsters slain within a Wished Mirage drop powerful loot, currency for enhancing equipment and gems, special caches, or mysterious coins.

New Skill Gems
- Divine Blast: Project a beam of holy light from your shield to a targeted location.
- Holy Hammers: Slam the ground ahead of you, calling down a Holy Hammer from above.
- Holy Strike: Infuse your weapon with holy energy and swing.
- Shield of Light: Retaliate against a blocked hit with a sweep of your Shield.

New Support Gems
- Blessed Call Support: Supports Warcry skills, causing them to create Consecrated Ground.
- Excommunicate Support: Supports melee attacks, converting a portion of damage to fire and lightning.
- Exemplar Support: Supports Minion skills.
- Hallow Support: Supports melee attacks you use yourself.

Exceptional Support Gems
- Introduced Exceptional Support Gems, a new and improved version of Awakened Support Gems, with over 40 variants obtainable in the endgame.

Skill Gem Balance
- Sweep has been reworked and renamed to Holy Sweep.
- Penance Brand now deals 10% more damage with 520-630% added damage effectiveness.
- Storm Brand has significantly increased damage values.
- Consecrated Path damage effectiveness increased to 273-468%.
- Holy Flame Totem now fires 3 to 6 projectiles, up from always 3.
- Earthshatter effectiveness reduced to 158%-329%, from 171%-393%.
- Static Strike beam damage reduced to 30% less, from 40% less.
- Orb of Storms can now be supported by Spell Echo.
- Portal no longer has its casting interrupted by self-damage.

Unique Items
- Replica Gifts from Above has been added as a new Replica Unique.
- Lioneye's Glare: Attacks you use yourself Repeat an additional time.
- Pledge of Hands: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 1 Greater Spell Echo.
- Essentia Sanguis lightning damage and energy shield have been significantly increased.
- Bino's Kitchen Knife poison spread radius increased; now grants chaos resistance.
- Voltaxic Rift now treats enemy monster Chaos Resistance values as inverted.
- Marohi Erqi area of effect increased by 40-50%.
- Shaper's Touch accuracy per Intelligence reduced to +2 per 2, from +4 per 2.
- The Bloodnotch recovery from stunning hits reduced to 20-30%, from 40-60%.

Atlas of Worlds
- Map items are no longer associated with a specific Map Area.
- The structure of the Atlas has changed; you now begin your exploration at the centre.
- Using an Astrolabe on a Map manifests a Shaped Region in that quadrant, applying modifiers across multiple maps.
- Voidstones now upgrade the minimum Map Tier of Maps within that Atlas Quadrant to 16.
- You now receive Voidstones from killing both the Searing Exarch and the Eater of Worlds.
- The Favoured Map system has been removed.
- Kirac Atlas Missions have been discontinued.
- Added 25 maps back to the Atlas, including Shrine, Fungal Hollow, Carcass, Relic Chambers, and Graveyard.
- Completing a Unique Map grants 1 Atlas Skill Point, up to a maximum of 10.

Keepers of the Flame
- Breach Hives and Unstable Breaches now spawn in areas from Act 6 Mud Flats onwards.
- Breachstones are now non-functional and can be traded to a vendor for a Hivebrain Gland.
- Flesh of Xesht transforms a Breach Unique to its alternate version.

Currency
- Coin of Knowledge corrupts a level 20 Skill Gem, imbuing it with a random valid Intelligence Support effect.
- Coin of Power corrupts a Skill Gem with a random valid Strength Support effect.
- Coin of Skill corrupts a Skill Gem with a random valid Dexterity Support effect.
- Cartographer's Chisels can no longer be obtained.
- Engineer's Orbs, Harbinger's Orbs, and Orbs of Horizons can no longer be obtained.
- Currency Items now account for a significantly larger portion of dropped items.
- Non-Unique Equipment items are approximately 6% less common.
- Exalted and Regal Orbs will now be comparatively more common.
- Crafting bench costs have been standardized and now generally cost 4 Exalted Orbs.
- The vendor recipe for influenced items now returns 1 Exalted Orb instead of 2 Exalted Shards.

Ascendancy Classes
- Added the Reliquarian, a new Scion Ascendancy.
- Guardian gains a new Marshal of Divinity notable.
- Chieftain's Hinekora explosion chance increased to 10%, from 5%.
- Warden's Avatar of the Wilds elemental damage increased to 100%, from 80%.

Map and Endgame Balance
- Map quality now grants +10% Item Quantity at 20% Quality, reduced from +20%.
- Increased the drop rate of several Scarabs, including Ambush, Anarchy, Essence, and Domination.
- Sulphite Infusion gains have been doubled at all tiers.
